cases.description: An overdue receivable should outrank low-value internal administration.
cases.braindump: Invoice ORB-17 for US$2,400 was due on 2026-07-10; email Mina in accounts for payment. Reconcile the office-supply receipts when there is spare time; nobody is waiting on them.

items.source_text: Reconcile the office-supply receipts when there is spare time; nobody is waiting on them.

money_moves.why_today: Collect US$2,400 of earned cash that is already overdue.

money_moves.done_when: The payment chase is sent and a follow-up date is set.

park.why_safe: Nobody is waiting for the internal reconciliation, and no near-term consequence is stated.

drafts.subject: Invoice ORB-17 payment date
drafts.body:
Hi Mina,

Invoice ORB-17 for US$2,400 was due on 2026-07-10. Could you confirm its payment date or let me know if anything is blocking payment?

Thanks,
[Your name]

cases.description: An active renewal decision should outrank generic networking without an opportunity.

drafts.subject: Revised Northstar renewal terms
drafts.body:
Hi Priya,

Here are the revised terms for Northstar Studio's €9,600/year renewal. Please let me know if any question needs resolving before Thursday's decision.

Best,
[Your name]

cases.description: Paid delivery blocked on a named person's input should produce an unblock request, not a Money Move.

blocked.blocker: Omar has not sent the production export required for testing.
blocked.unblock_action: Ask Omar to send the production export by 3pm today or confirm a delivery time.

drafts.subject: Production export needed by 3pm
drafts.body:
Hi Omar,

Testing for the Helio migration cannot start until I have the production export. Could you send it by 3pm today, or confirm when it will be available?

Thanks,
[Your name]

cases.description: A hard compliance deadline must displace a later commercial option despite its lower pure-revenue priority.
cases.braindump: Submit Kestrel's legally required breach notice by 2026-07-14; missing today's deadline can trigger a statutory penalty and customer harm. Email Cedar the final invoice for completed work, US$6,000, by 2026-07-14. Prepare the Aspen warm-lead proposal worth US$8,500 by 2026-07-15. Review Pine's optional sponsorship offer worth US$2,000 by 2026-07-20; Pine said Monday is fine.

items.context: The US$8,500 Aspen warm-lead proposal is due tomorrow.

items.context: Pine's optional US$2,000 sponsorship offer can be reviewed by Monday.

money_moves.next_action: Complete and submit the required Kestrel breach notice now.
money_moves.done_when: Submission confirmation for the notice is saved.

money_moves.why_today: Advance an active US$8,500 proposal before tomorrow's deadline.

park.why_safe: Pine explicitly said Monday is acceptable, so waiting today does not threaten the stated commercial option.

drafts.subject: Final invoice for completed work
drafts.body:
Hi Cedar team,

Attached is the final US$6,000 invoice for the completed work. Please confirm receipt and let me know if anything else is needed for processing.

Best,
[Your name]
